name: Skeleton
description: An animated pile of bones held together by dark magic. Its hollow eyes glow with unnatural light as it shambles forward.

attacks.name: Rusty Shortsword
attacks.description: A corroded blade wielded with mechanical precision

attacks.name: Bony Claw
attacks.description: A raking strike with skeletal fingers

special_abilities.name: Damage Resistance (Piercing)
special_abilities.description: Takes half damage from piercing weapons (arrows, spears)

special_abilities.name: Undead Nature
special_abilities.description: Immune to poison and fear effects

behavior.notes: Moves directly toward player, alternates between sword and claw attacks
